# Platforms and environments

> Hardware & software platforms and environments supporting OpenTelemetry

---

LLMS index: [llms.txt](/llms.txt)

---

OpenTelemetry is available for a variety of platforms and environments, ensuring
seamless observability in hybrid systems. This section covers how to enable and
use OpenTelemetry on supported platforms.

---

Section pages:

- [Client-side Apps](/docs/platforms/client-apps/): Use OpenTelemetry on end-user controlled apps running on devices like mobile phones, desktop computers, and retail kiosks.
- [Functions as a Service](/docs/platforms/faas/): OpenTelemetry supports various methods of monitoring Function-as-a-Service provided by different cloud vendors
- [OpenTelemetry with Kubernetes](/docs/platforms/kubernetes/)
